TLINE.TDLINE: INCLUDE &T001G-TXTAB& OBJECT TEXT ID ADRS LANGUAGE &T001-SPRAS&
INCLUDE &T001G-TXTFU& OBJECT TEXT ID ADRS LANGUAGE &T001-SPRAS&
INCLUDE &T001G-TXTKO& OBJECT TEXT ID ADRS LANGUAGE &T001-SPRAS&
*- Info line if you know the customer/vendor's account or clerk-*
*-Info line if you do not know the customer/vendor's account or clerk-*
*-----Info. line if no account held at customer/vendor ---------------*
*- Letter text for payment settlement notice -------------------------*
Many thanks for your payment on &BKPF-BLDAT&
*- Letter text for debit from payment settlement ---------------------*
Many thanks for your payment on &BKPF-BLDAT&
*- Letter text for credit memo from payment settlement ---------------*
Many thanks for your payment on &BKPF-BLDAT&
*- Letter text for payment settlement notice -------------------------*
Due to an incoming payment on &BKPF-BLDAT&,
the following amount was paid on a
We have posted this to your account.
*- Letter text for debit from payment settlement ---------------------*
Due to an incoming payment on &BKPF-BLDAT&,
the following amount was paid on a
We have posted this to your account.
*- Letter text for credit memo from payment settlement ---------------*

the following amount was paid on a
We have posted this to your account.
Payment settlement notice through partial payment
Many thanks for your payment on &BKPF-BLDAT&
which we have posted to your account.
*- Letter text for debit from payment settlement ---------------------*
Many thanks for your payment on &BKPF-BLDAT&
which we have posted to your account
*- Letter text for credit memo from payment settlement ---------------*
Credit memo from partial payment settlement
Many thanks for your payment on &BKPF-BLDAT&
which we have posted to your account.
*- Letter text for credit memo from payment settlement ---------------*
The following transaction was posted to your account:
*- Sum total for clearing and/or partial payment ---------------------*
*- an individual text can be included here as an alternative or in----*
*- addition. This text can still be changed --------------------------*
*- /* must be replaced by /: in the line with the INCLUDE ------------*
INCLUDE &RF140-TDNAME& OBJECT BKORM ID FIKO LANGUAGE &RF140-TDSPRAS&
We request clearing of the debt or a reason for the deduction of items
*- an individual text can be included here as an alternative or in----*
*- addition. This text can still be changed --------------------------*
*- /* must be replaced by /: in the line with the INCLUDE ------------*
INCLUDE &RF140-TDNAME& OBJECT BKORM ID FIKO LANGUAGE &RF140-TDSPRAS&
We request clearing of the invoice-related debts or a reason for the
deduction of items with the following document numbers.
In order to properly post the account items, please mark the relevant
open items on the reply letter. If there are any differences in totals
please enclose a statement of amounts.
*- an individual text can be included here as an alternative or in----*
*- addition. This text can still be changed --------------------------*
*- /* must be replaced by /: in the line with the INCLUDE ------------*
INCLUDE &RF140-TDNAME& OBJECT BKORM ID FIKO LANGUAGE &RF140-TDSPRAS&
In order to properly post the account items, please mark the relevant
open items on the reply letter. If there are any differences in the
totals, please enclose a statement of these amounts.
*- an individual text can be included here as an alternative or in----*
*- addition. This text can still be changed --------------------------*
*- /* must be replaced by /: in the line with the INCLUDE ------------*
INCLUDE &RF140-TDNAME& OBJECT BKORM ID FIKO LANGUAGE &RF140-TDSPRAS&

In order to properly post the account items, please mark the relevant
open items on the reply letter. If there are any differences in
amounts, please enclose a statement of these amounts.

INCLUDE &RF140-TDNAME& OBJECT BKORM ID FIKO LANGUAGE &RF140-TDSPRAS&
*- Credit memo with open item list 2 ---------------------------------*
In order to properly post the account items, please mark the relevant
open items on the reply letter. If there are any differences in
amounts, please enclose a statement of these amounts.
*- an individual text can be included here as an alternative or in----*
*- addition. This text can still be changed --------------------------*
*- /* must be replaced by /: in the line with the INCLUDE ------------*
INCLUDE &RF140-TDNAME& OBJECT BKORM ID FIKO LANGUAGE &RF140-TDSPRAS&
Unfortunately, assignment of this posting is not possible. Therefore
we request a note to payee for the document number given above.
*- an individual text can be included here as an alternative or in----*
*- addition. This text can still be changed --------------------------*
*- /* must be replaced by /: in the line with the INCLUDE ------------*
INCLUDE &RF140-TDNAME& OBJECT BKORM ID FIKO LANGUAGE &RF140-TDSPRAS&
Unfortunately, assignment of this posting is not possible. In order to
properly post this account item, please mark the relevant open items on
the reply letter. If there are any differences in amounts, please
